inputs.label: Observed Time (seconds)
inputs.businessContext: Average cycle time recorded during direct observation, excluding any abnormal delays.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cycle time recorded during direct observation, excluding any abnormal delays.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğrudan gözlem sırasında kaydedilen, anormal gecikmeler hariç ortalama çevrim süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Zykluszeit, aufgezeichnet während direkter Beobachtung, ohne abnormale Verzögerungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de cycle moyen enregistré lors de l'observation directe, hors délais anormaux.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo de ciclo promedio registrado durante la observación directa, excluyendo demoras anormales.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط زمن الدورة المسجل أثناء الملاحظة المباشرة، باستثناء أي تأخيرات غير طبيعية.

inputs.label: Performance Rating (%)
inputs.businessContext: Operator pace relative to normal (100% = standard pace). Based on Westinghouse or similar rating system.

businessContext_i18n.en: Operator pace relative to normal (100% = standard pace). Based on Westinghouse or similar rating system.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Operatör hızının normale göre oranı (%100 = standart hız). Westinghouse veya benzeri değerlendirme sistemine dayanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Arbeitstempo relativ zur Norm (100% = Standardtempo). Basierend auf Westinghouse oder ähnlichem Bewertungssystem.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Allure de l'opérateur par rapport à la normale (100 % = allure standard). Basé sur le système Westinghouse ou similaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ritmo del operador en relación con lo normal (100% = ritmo estándar). Basado en el sistema Westinghouse o similar.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سرعة المشغل بالنسبة للسرعة الطبيعية (100% = السرعة القياسية). بناءً على نظام ويستنغهاوس أو نظام تقييم مشابه.

inputs.label: Allowance Percentage (%)
inputs.businessContext: Total allowance for fatigue, personal needs, and unavoidable delays (ISO 9001 / ILO guidelines).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total allowance for fatigue, personal needs, and unavoidable delays (ISO 9001 / ILO guidelines).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yorgunluk, kişisel ihtiyaçlar ve kaçınılmaz gecikmeler için toplam izin (ISO 9001 / ILO yönergeleri).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzuschlag für Ermüdung, persönliche Bedürfnisse und unvermeidbare Verzögerungen (ISO 9001 / ILO-Richtlinien).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Majoration totale pour fatigue, besoins personnels et retards inévitables (normes ISO 9001 / OIT).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tolerancia total por fatiga, necesidades personales y demoras inevitables (directrices ISO 9001 / OIT).
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي السماح للإرهاق والاحتياجات الشخصية والتأخيرات الحتمية (إرشادات ISO 9001 / منظمة العمل الدولية).

inputs.label: Frequency per Cycle
inputs.businessContext: How many times the observed element occurs per complete work cycle (e.g., 2 inspections per assembly).

businessContext_i18n.en: How many times the observed element occurs per complete work cycle (e.g., 2 inspections per assembly).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gözlemlenen elemanın tam bir iş çevriminde kaç kez gerçekleştiği (örneğin, montaj başına 2 muayene).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wie oft das beobachtete Element pro vollständigem Arbeitszyklus vorkommt (z.B. 2 Prüfungen pro Montage).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de fois que l'élément observé se produit par cycle de travail complet (ex. 2 inspections par assemblage).
businessContext_i18n.es: Cuántas veces ocurre el elemento observado por ciclo de trabajo completo (ej. 2 inspecciones por ensamblaje).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد مرات حدوث العنصر المرصود لكل دورة عمل كاملة (مثال: فحصان لكل تجميع).

inputs.label: Work Measurement Method
inputs.businessContext: The technique used to obtain the observed time; affects confidence and adjustment factors.

businessContext_i18n.en: The technique used to obtain the observed time; affects confidence and adjustment factors.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gözlemlenen süreyi elde etmek için kullanılan teknik; güven ve düzeltme faktörlerini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Technik zur Ermittlung der beobachteten Zeit; beeinflusst Konfidenz- und Anpassungsfaktoren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Technique utilisée pour obtenir le temps observé ; affecte les facteurs de confiance et d'ajustement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Técnica utilizada para obtener el tiempo observado; afecta los factores de confianza y ajuste.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التقنية المستخدمة للحصول على الوقت المرصود؛ تؤثر على عوامل الثقة والتعديل.

inputs.label: Include Learning Curve Adjustment
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies a learning curve factor (80% slope) for new or changed processes.

label_i18n.fr: Inclure l'ajustement de la courbe d'apprentissage
label_i18n.es: Incluir ajuste por curva de aprendizaje

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies a learning curve factor (80% slope) for new or changed processes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, yeni veya değiştirilmiş süreçler için bir öğrenme eğrisi faktörü (%80 eğim) uygular.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn wahr, wird ein Lernkurvenfaktor (80% Steigung) für neue oder geänderte Prozesse angewendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, applique un facteur de courbe d'apprentissage (pente de 80 %) pour les processus nouveaux ou modifiés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, aplica un factor de curva de aprendizaje (pendiente del 80%) para procesos nuevos o modificados.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إذا كان صحيحًا، يطبق عامل منحنى التعلم (ميل 80%) للعمليات الجديدة أو المتغيرة.

rules.message: Observed time must be greater than 0 seconds.
Performance rating must be between 50% and 150%.
Allowance percentage must be between 0% and 50%.
Frequency per cycle must be positive.
Learning curve adjustment is not recommended with Work Sampling method due to high variability.

thresholds.message: Observed time exceeds typical single-element threshold; consider breaking down the element.
High performance rating may indicate rating bias; verify with video analysis.
Allowance above 20% may indicate excessive non-value-added time; review work conditions.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
